subject: (no subject)
body:
Hi Jeffrey :)

Sorry for the message, I was out with a friend and planning on maybe coming to America soonish and got excited and wanted to let you know :)

Would be lovely to see you if you're around!

How have you been?

I'm well, just been very busy with work!

Lots of love xxx

Sent from my iPhone

> On 13 May 2017, at 8:31 PM, Juliette Bryant <juliettebryant@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> I'm coming to America soon
> 
> Can I come visit you :)
> 
> Sent from my iPhone
body_html:
Hi Jeffrey :)

How have you been?

I'm well, just been very busy with work!

Lots of love xxx
